name: Cherry Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the milk, beaten egg, and oil. Pour this mixture over the dry ingredients and stir just until combined.
3. Gently fold in the cherries and shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Grease a 9 1/4 x 5 1/4 x 2 3/4 inch loaf pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 55-65 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool on a rack for 10 minutes before removing from the pan and cooling completely on a wire rack.
8. Serve the bread at room temperature or toasted.
